goal: Top 10 indie matcha-drink competitors in Metro Manila for competitor study

top10.name: Matchanese
top10.area: SM North EDSA (The Block, Ground Level), Quezon City & The Podium (2/F The Corner Market), Mandaluyong
top10.signatureDrink: Signature Matchanese Latte (customizable matcha strength levels 1-3 + sweetness; oat/coconut milk options)
top10.sourcing: Claims 100% organic matcha imported weekly from Kyoto, Japan; freshly hand-whisked. Reviews and listings reference ceremonial-grade matcha. Specific farm/brand not stated publicly.
top10.hook: Positions itself as the first homegrown specialty matcha bar in Manila with freshly whisked Kyoto matcha and customizable strength levels (1-3) at accessible prices.
top10.scale: Homegrown indie matcha bar; 2 mall kiosks + mobile event bar
top10.notes: CONFIRMED real and operating. Indie/homegrown matcha-drink brand, NOT a big chain. Started as an online matcha purveyor (~2021 per IG highlight) then opened its first physical matcha bar at SM North EDSA in September 2023 (TikTok soft-opening post: "first homegrown matcha bar in manila"); branded as "first specialty matcha bar in Manila." Matcha is the clear hero of the menu (lattes, einspanner, cloud, hojicha/genmaicha, matcha cookies/desserts) with coffee only as a small side. FORMAT: small mall kiosk / matcha bar counter (a Google review calls it "this small matcha kiosk near the grocery store"); also runs a bookable mobile matcha bar for weddings/events/pop-ups. 2 confirmed standing branches: SM North EDSA (QC) and The Podium (Mandaluyong) — both in Metro Manila. Signature Matchanese Latte base price PHP 190, customizable by matcha strength (levels 1-3) and sweetness, with oat/coconut milk options (strength upgrade costs extra). Prices verified via official cococart ordering page and an aggregator menu listing; menu prices consistent across sources. Google Maps: 4.7 stars, 289 reviews, ~PHP 1-500/person, recent activity (reviews within months, photos ~16 days ago) = growing/active health signal. IG followers 18.8K verified directly on profile (18,800; 502 posts). TikTok ~23.4K from search snippets — could NOT verify directly because TikTok showed an anti-bot 'Please wait' wall; treat TikTok count as approximate. Some travel/listicle articles list extra branches (Greenbelt, Power Plant, S Maison, SM Aura) but those appear to be aggregated/aspirational or conflated with other brands and were NOT confirmed on official channels; only SM North EDSA and Podium are confirmed in the brand's own IG bio. Confidence 0.85 (existence, format, sourcing claim, signature price all well-corroborated; TikTok follower count and exact total branch count slightly less certain).
top10.verifyReason: Real, operating indie matcha-only brand in Metro Manila (SM North EDSA QC + The Podium Mandaluyong); matchanese.com lists both branches OPEN DAILY 10AM-10PM and @matchaneseph shows 18.8K followers; spot.ph confirms Signature Matcha Latte P190 — all claims accurate.

Signature/most-photographed drinks: Kumo (P240), Caramiso (salted caramel + miso, P250), plus secret-menu Ramune/Matcha Soda (P260) and Kumo Berry (P260). Iced matcha latte (~16oz) reference price ~P240 (Kumo). Google 4.7 stars / 137 reviews (via Wanderlog). IG ~13K followers; TikTok @matchalaterph small (~178). Opening: appears to have opened early 2024 (TikTok posts call it newly opened "last Wednesday" in early 2024; some coverage from 2023-2024) - year inferred, moderate confidence.
